title: poa nemoralis subsp. subpolaris
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. subpolaris is a subspecies of the meadow grass Poa nemoralis, commonly found in mountainous regions and cold climates. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. subpolaris include its potential to alleviate pain, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antioxidant properties. Poa nemoralis subsp. subpolaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts may also be used in pharmaceutical applications.
